title: Emotional Needs: What’s Yours?
caption: Ever felt unheard in your relationship?
layout: A two-column comparison layout. Left column lists common emotional needs (e.g., validation, support, affection). Right column explores how these needs manifest in relationships, offering examples of unmet needs and their effects, creating a clear visual distinction.

title: Intimacy After 40: It's Different
caption: Have you noticed a shift in intimacy as you've aged?
layout: A cycle diagram showing the stages of intimacy evolution (e.g., physical intimacy, emotional connection, spiritual bonding). Each stage has corresponding actions and activities to foster intimacy, creating a flow that encourages ongoing connection.

title: The 5 Stages of Post-Divorce Dating
caption: Are you ready to re-enter the dating scene?
layout: A 4-stage progression infographic outlining the journey from self-discovery to navigating new relationships. Each stage describes key emotions, challenges, and tips for making the process smoother, providing a roadmap for exploration.

title: Mind-Body Connection: What to Know
caption: How does your body speak to you?
layout: A 2x2 grid comparing signals from the body versus signals from the mind. Each quadrant highlights body cues (e.g., tension, relaxation) and corresponding mental states (e.g., stress, calm), creating awareness for better self-understanding.

title: Communication Styles: Are You Heard?
caption: Do you feel like your partner gets you?
layout: A two-column structure with one side listing different communication styles (e.g., assertive, passive, aggressive) and the other side detailing their impacts on relationships, encouraging readers to reflect on their own styles.

title: The Role of Playfulness in Relationships
caption: When was the last time you had fun together?
layout: A cycle diagram illustrating the importance of play in relationships. Each segment shows activities that foster joy, connection, and laughter, encouraging couples to incorporate more playful moments into their lives.

title: Navigating Sexual Changes in Midlife
caption: Notice any changes in your sexual health?
layout: A two-column layout comparing physical changes (e.g., hormonal shifts, libido changes) against emotional impacts (e.g., body image, intimacy fears). This helps women understand their experiences and seek dialogues on change.

title: Rekindling Romance: Your Midlife Guide
caption: Is your spark feeling dim?
layout: A 4-stage progression showing steps to rekindle romance (e.g., communication, vulnerability, scheduling date nights, exploring new experiences). Each stage includes practical tips and supportive reflections to inspire action.

title: Authenticity vs. Masking
caption: Are you showing up as your true self?
layout: A 2x2 grid contrasting authenticity (self-acceptance, vulnerability) against masking (people-pleasing, insecurity). Each part highlights traits and behaviours, providing clarity on personal growth.

title: The Art of Flirting, Reimagined
caption: Do you remember the last time you flirted?
layout: A cycle diagram with steps to flirtation: eye contact, playful teasing, body language, and verbal compliments. Each step includes practical examples and tips to encourage playful interaction.

title: Attraction Beyond Looks: The Factors
caption: What draws you to someone now?
layout: A four-segment progression highlighting attributes of attraction (e.g., emotional connection, shared values, humour, physical traits). Each segment can include self-reflection prompts to uncover personal priorities.

title: Hormonal Shifts: The Intimacy Impact
caption: Have hormonal changes affected your relationship?
layout: A two-column layout contrasting hormonal changes during midlife (e.g., oestrogen decline) with their implications for intimacy and attraction. This structure makes it relatable and educative.

title: Creating Safety in Relationships
caption: Do you feel safe with your partner?
layout: A cycle diagram showcasing how emotional safety links to trust, vulnerability, and intimacy. Each section highlights actions that can enhance relational safety, helping readers strengthen their bonds.

title: Overcoming Midlife Fears
caption: What fears hold you back in intimacy?
layout: A 4-stage progression outlining fears (e.g., rejection, inadequacy) and corresponding strategies to overcome them (e.g., communication, self-reflection). This infographic empowers readers to confront their fears.

title: Passion Projects: What Lights You Up?
caption: Are you pursuing your passions?
layout: A two-column structure highlighting personal vs. shared passions. Each column contains prompts and reflection questions to inspire the reader's journey in finding or rekindling what excites them.

title: Self-Care Rituals for the Soul
caption: What are your daily self-care practices?
layout: A cycle diagram outlining daily, weekly, and monthly self-care rituals (e.g., meditation, journaling, pampering). Each segment includes a brief description, making it a visual guide for holistic wellness.

title: Setting Intentions in Relationships
caption: Have you set intentions for your partnership lately?
layout: A two-column comparison detailing the differences between vague desires and clear intentions. This infographic encourages setting relationship goals, with prompts for actionable steps.

title: Healing from Betrayal: Steps to Recovery
caption: How do you move forward after betrayal?
layout: A 4-stage progression illustrating the healing journey (e.g., acknowledgment, processing, rebuilding trust, finding closure). Each stage includes strategies and reflection points for personal growth.

title: Understanding Sexual Compatibility
caption: Do you and your partner align in your desires?
layout: A two-column structure comparing sexual preferences and styles. Each column highlights common differences vs commonalities, with prompts for dialogue and exploration.

title: The Cycle of Self-Discovery
caption: Are you growing into your best self?
layout: A cycle diagram depicting the journey of self-discovery (e.g., reflection, exploration, embracing change, self-acceptance), encouraging mindful practices and self-exploration.

title: Navigating Conflict with Grace
caption: How do you handle disagreements?
layout: A cycle diagram showcasing key steps in resolving conflict (e.g., acknowledgment, active listening, empathy, resolution). Each step offers practical tools for maintaining harmony.

title: The Balance Between Independence and Togetherness
caption: How do you maintain your individuality in a relationship?
layout: A 2x2 grid contrasting independence (self-care, personal hobbies) with togetherness (shared experiences, teamwork). Each part promotes reflection on personal balance.

title: Embodying Your Sexual Self
caption: How comfortable are you in your own skin?
layout: A cycle diagram featuring stages of embodiment (e.g., self-acceptance, exploration, expression, empowerment). Each stage invites readers to engage with their sexuality more openly.

title: The Little Things that Matter
caption: What small actions reinforce love daily?
layout: A two-column comparison of grand gestures vs small acts of kindness. The right column highlights simple daily actions that create connection, encouraging readers to notice and appreciate.

title: Revisiting Your Relationship Timeline
caption: How has your journey shaped your connection?
layout: A 4-stage progression outlining key relationship milestones (e.g., first meeting, deepening connection, challenges faced, current state). Each stage encourages reflection on growth and change.

title: Navigating the New Sexual Landscape
caption: What’s your relationship with pleasure now?
layout: A two-column comparison illustrating old vs new perspectives on sexuality. Highlighting shifts in views can empower women to embrace their evolving desires.

title: The Power of Touch: Beyond the Bedroom
caption: When was the last time you touched base physically?
layout: A cycle diagram revealing types of touch (e.g., affectionate, comforting, playful) and their effects on relational dynamics. Each segment encourages exploration beyond sexual intimacy.
